title: Healthy Brain Network (HBN) EEG - Release 7
description: The Healthy Brain Network (HBN) EEG Release 7 dataset comprises high-resolution electroencephalogram recordings from 381 children and adolescents (ages 5-21 years) performing six distinct cognitive and perceptual tasks, including resting state, passive viewing tasks (surround suppression, movie watching), and active tasks (contrast change detection, sequence learning, symbol search). The dataset includes behavioral responses, hierarchical event descriptors (HED) for systematic meta-analysis, and psychopathology factors derived from the Child Behavior Checklist, providing a rich resource for understanding neural correlates of development and mental health.
methods_description: EEG data were collected during six tasks: three passive tasks (resting state with eyes open/closed, surround suppression with flashing peripheral disks, and movie watching) and three active tasks requiring participant responses (contrast change detection, sequence learning, and symbol search). Behavioral responses including reaction times and accuracy were recorded during task performance and are included in the events.tsv files. Events and behavioral markers were annotated using Hierarchical Event Descriptors (HED v8.3.0) to enable systematic meta and mega-analysis. Data quality control ensured absence of corruption, presence of necessary task events, and readiness for preprocessing.
